name: Honeyλ (HoneyLambda)
description: Simple, serverless application designed to create and monitor URL honeytokens, on top of AWS Lambda and Amazon API Gateway. Tool: https://github.com/0x4D31/honeylambda. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #605 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Honeyλ (HoneyLambda) output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Honeyλ (HoneyLambda) output file to parse instead of running it live.
